title: security: restrict better-auth trustedOrigins to Pollinations domains
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Locking the hive gates
gist.blurb: Tightened up our authentication origins to keep the hive extra secure. Just some routine maintenance to ensure your sessions stay safe and sound.
gist.summary: Restricted better-auth trusted origins to explicit Pollinations domains to enhance CSRF and redirect security.
gist.impact: Improves backend security by ensuring authentication requests only originate from trusted Pollinations domains.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly security guard checking a list of approved visitors with the monitor robot at a garden gate.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, standing next to a chunky monitor robot holding a clipboard with a checklist. They are guarding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) garden gate. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, standing next to a chunky monitor robot holding a clipboard with a checklist. They are guarding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) garden gate. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
